scripts.build: tsc && vite build && vite build --config vite.worker.config.ts
scripts.test: rm -rf .test-build && esbuild src/core/transcription/aot-pipeline.ts src/core/transcription/aot-scheduler.ts src/core/transcription/caption-splitter.ts src/core/transcription/hallucination-filter.ts src/core/transcription/transcription-engine.ts src/core/audio/aot-stream-decoder.ts --bundle --format=esm --outbase=src/core --outdir=.test-build --log-level=warning && node --test test/
